nodes.title: Knight Class Stats
nodes.description: Given a MedievalCharacter with CharacterClassType=Knight, when Start() runs, then stats are: MaxHealth=150, MaxStamina=120, AttackPower=15, Defense=10, Speed=8. CurrentHealth and CurrentStamina equal max values.

nodes.title: Mage Class Stats
nodes.description: Given a MedievalCharacter with CharacterClassType=Mage, when Start() runs, then stats are: MaxHealth=80, MaxStamina=150, AttackPower=20, Defense=3, Speed=10.

nodes.title: Archer Class Stats
nodes.description: Given a MedievalCharacter with CharacterClassType=Archer, when Start() runs, then stats are: MaxHealth=100, MaxStamina=130, AttackPower=12, Defense=5, Speed=12.

nodes.title: Rogue Class Stats
nodes.description: Given a MedievalCharacter with CharacterClassType=Rogue, when Start() runs, then stats are: MaxHealth=90, MaxStamina=140, AttackPower=14, Defense=4, Speed=15.

nodes.title: Dreamer Class Stats
nodes.description: Given a MedievalCharacter with CharacterClassType=Dreamer, when Start() runs, then stats are: MaxHealth=120, MaxStamina=130, AttackPower=14, Defense=6, Speed=9.

nodes.title: Set Identity
nodes.description: Given a MedievalCharacter, when SetIdentity(classType, displayName, soundTheme) is called, then CharacterClassType, CharacterName, and SoundTheme are updated to the provided values.

nodes.title: Set Stats Override
nodes.description: Given a MedievalCharacter, when SetStats(maxHealth, maxStamina, attackPower, defense, speed) is called, then all stat fields are set and CurrentHealth/CurrentStamina are set to their max values.

nodes.title: Health Change Event
nodes.description: Given a character, when ApplyCustomDamage or Heal is called, then OnHealthChanged fires with (currentHealth, maxHealth).

nodes.title: Stamina Change Event
nodes.description: Given a character, when ConsumeStamina or RestoreStamina is called, then OnStaminaChanged fires with (currentStamina, maxStamina).

nodes.title: Character Defeated Event
nodes.description: Given a character, when ApplyCustomDamage reduces health to 0, then IsAlive() returns false and OnCharacterDefeated fires with the defeated character.

nodes.title: Restore Stamina Modifiers
nodes.description: Given a character with Hunger, Age, HungerScar effects and a PovertyManager, when RestoreStamina(amount) is called, then the amount is multiplied by each active modifier's StaminaRegenModifier and PovertyManager.GetStaminaRegenMultiplier() before adding to CurrentStamina.

nodes.title: Fairy Form Apply Remove
nodes.description: Given a character, when ApplyFairyForm(duration) is called, then IsFairyForm returns true and FairyFormRemaining >= duration. When the timer elapses (via Update), RemoveFairyForm restores original appearance and IsFairyForm returns false.
